value_chain_position: Property management SaaS platform layer — sells the operating system for residential property managers (leasing, maintenance, accounting, payments) and collects payments/fintech revenue on top of software fees.
true_competitors: REAL Page (private, acquired by Thoma Bravo)
relative_comps: AppFolio serves the underserved SMB/mid-market property manager segment (1-5k units) that Yardi and RealPage deprioritize; 21% YoY growth with 23% FCF margin reflects AI-driven leasing automation and ARPU expansion. The competitive set is mostly private (Yardi, Entrata, RealPage) so APPF is the only pure-play public comps. The fintech_rails tag reflects payments and insurance distribution embedded in the workflow as toll-taker revenue. Relatively low load-bearing score as switching is painful but technically feasible at mid-market scale.
